evals.name: eval-greenfield-ts
evals.prompt: I have a new TypeScript React project with no linting or formatting set up. I want oxlint for linting and oxfmt for formatting.
evals.expected_output: Creates .oxlintrc.json and .oxfmtrc.json with correct default configs, adds lint and format scripts to package.json

evals.name: eval-partial-add-oxfmt
evals.prompt: Our JS/TS project already has oxlint configured. We want to add oxfmt for formatting.
evals.expected_output: Detects existing .oxlintrc.json and oxlint script, adds only .oxfmtrc.json and format script without touching existing lint setup

evals.name: eval-multi-ecosystem-go-shell
evals.prompt: Set up linting for our Go server and our shell deployment scripts.
evals.expected_output: Creates .golangci.yaml with formatters block, Makefile with tools and lint targets, .shellcheckrc

evals.name: eval-teacher-workspace
evals.prompt: Set up oxlint and oxfmt for the JS/TS workspace and golangci-lint for the Go server. We use pnpm.
evals.expected_output: Creates .oxlintrc.json, .oxfmtrc.json, .golangci.yaml, Makefile — all matching the skill's default configs. package.json gets lint and format scripts.

evals.name: eval-switch-prettier-to-oxfmt
evals.prompt: We're moving from Prettier to oxfmt for formatting. Remove Prettier and replace it with oxfmt. Keep ESLint as-is. We use npm.
evals.expected_output: Creates .oxfmtrc.json, removes prettier from devDependencies, updates format script to use oxfmt, wires eslint-config-prettier for ESLint+oxfmt compatibility. Does NOT create .prettierignore.
assertions: .oxfmtrc.json was created with correct default config
package.json format script uses oxfmt (not prettier)
eslint-config-prettier is present in devDependencies (ESLint+formatter wiring)

evals.name: eval-eslint-oxfmt-no-prettierignore
evals.prompt: Our TypeScript project has no formatting set up yet. We want ESLint for linting and oxfmt for formatting. We use npm.
evals.expected_output: Creates eslint.config.js and .oxfmtrc.json, installs eslint-config-prettier for wiring, adds lint and format scripts to package.json. Does NOT create .prettierignore or .prettierrc.json.
assertions: .oxfmtrc.json was created with correct default config
